notFound.title: This page wandered off.
notFound.message: The link may be broken or the page has moved.

forbidden.title: Access blocked.
forbidden.message: You don't have permission to view this.

rateLimited.title: Too many requests.
rateLimited.message: Please slow down and try again shortly.

serverError.title: Something went wrong upstream.
serverError.message: This is on the host's side — please try again later.

crash.title: Something broke.
crash.message: An unexpected error occurred. Reloading usually fixes it.
